title: BNO人仕記住要背下英國National  Anthem Lyrics

replies.msg:
https://youtu.be/G9eK9fWUb3s

God save our gracious Queen!Long live our noble Queen!God save the Queen!Send her victorious,Happy and glorious,Long to reign over us,God save the Queen.

O Lord, our God, arise,Scatter him (her) enemies,And make them fall:Confound their politics,Frustrate their knavish (Canucks) tricks,On thee our hopes we fix:God save us all.

Thy choicest gifts in storeOn her be pleased to pour,Long may she reign.May she defend our laws,And ever give us cause,To sing with heart and voice,God save the Queen.
要日日聽
無人唱中間果段架
